creator: pauls@utdallas.edu
text:
The description should have read "There is a typo", not "There is a type" 
(which is rather ironic considering).  Also, these patch files go in 
/usr/ports/security/sguil-server/files/, which was not noted in the original 
PR.  My apologies for that.

The attached patch, if applied from /usr/ports, should update the port.

-- 
Paul Schmehl (pauls@utdallas.edu)
Senior Information Security Analyst
The University of Texas at Dallas
http://www.utdallas.edu/ir/security/
